name: WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite
description: A portable ceramic membrane filtration unit.

taxonomy.sub_category: WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite discontinued Updated on January 2, 2024 · Created on July 10, 2016 WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite Discontinued A portable ceramic membrane filtration unit. Developed By wateroam Tested By WateROAM ROAMfilter Lite Content Partners Unknown Info Tags Discontinued Snapshot Manufacturing & Delivery Performance & Use Research & Standards Feedback Product Description ​ROAMfilter Lite is a light and portable water filtration kit. The product filters water through a gravity-fed ceramic membrane, with the ability to remove 6 log bacteria and 4 log. The product is manufactured and distributed by WateROAM . From November 2018 the product has been discontinued. Target SDGs SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being Market Suggested Retail Price $25.00 Target Users (Target Impact Group) Household Distributors / Implementing Organizations Implementing partners included Relief Singapore, the Life Care Society, the Singapore Red Cross, and the Center for a Better Tomorrow. Competitive Landscape Direct competitors include Sawyer POINTOne 10” Filter and LifeWell Water Filter . Countries Burma, Malaysia, Nepal, Singapore Manufacturing/Building Method Unknown Intellectural Property Type Trademark User Provision Model The product is manufactured by WaterROAM, users can obtain the product directly from the manufacturer. Humanitarian organizations purchase and distribute products. Distributions to Date Status The exact number of ROAMfilter Lite units distributed to date is unknown. As of 2019, Wateroam has reached 83,000 people across 33 countries. Since 2019, Lite units have been distributed through humanitarian organizations to support disaster relief efforts in the Philippines (270 households) and Myanmar (2500 residents). Target use case Individual and household use Manufacturer-specified flow rate (L/hr) 4.5 Bacteria reduction 6 log Type of membrane filtration Microfiltration Virus reduction 4 log Protozoa reduction Unknown Heavy metals and/or arsenic reduction Unknown Maximum recommended influent turbidity level (NTU) Unknown Effluent turbidity levels (NTU) Unknown Material of construction Alumina Silicate Safe water storage capacity (L) None Manufacturer-specified lifetime volume (L) ?52,000 L (6L/ hour for 2 years) Design Specifications The ROAMfilter Lite is lightweight plastic bag primed internally with a membrane. The ceramic filter membrane has a pore size of 0.5?m. The system weighs 400g, with a membrane area of 0.025m2. The filter is functional in the pH range of 4-10, and operating pressure between 0.005 - 0.03 bar. The filter is made out of Alumina Silicate and is 0.5?m and weighs 300 g, with an attached tube tap of 100g. Technical Support Technical support available from the manufacturer. Replacement Components The product has a lifespan of 2years at recommended use. After this time the system must be replaced. Lifecycle 2 years Manufacturer Specified Performance Parameters The ROAMfilter Lite filters >95% for particulates above 0.5µm at a flowrate of 3-6 L/hr. Vetted Performance Status Tested by manufacturer to remove 99.9999% of bacteria and 99.99% of viruses. Safety This product is not designed to remove taste, chemicals and heavy metals. Available: https://www.wateroam.com/about-us.html Compliance with regulations The manufacturer states filter performance that complies WHO standards for bacteria and virus reduction. However, no specifications for other regulations are published. Evaluation methods Unknown Other Information None Comments from the Community 1 Comment Iana Aranda says: October 31, 2016 at 9:03 pm As per Bob: All medical device manufacturers have the responsibility to support their products throughout their entire lifecycle. No mention of this requirement is made in the product specifications. Appropriate retirement and recycling in developing countries is required. Leave a Reply You must be logged in to post a comment.
